features: Stylish Hair Ties: The six sets of braided hair ties are available in a variety of beautiful colors. Set of 12 pieces in each group to inspire you with different styles every day. With stylish pearl ornaments, these durable hair ties are always ready for ponytails or messy buns. Wear them comfortably on your wrist as cute bracelets when not in use.

Hair Protection: With soft and woven design, there is no snagging or wrinkles and can be easily removed from the head without being sticky. The hair ties can prevent your precious hair from breaking or tangling when you take off the curly hair ties, and protect your hair from band marks. It also distributes the "pressure" of a hair tie over a larger surface, providing firm ponytails all day without headaches.

High quality: These hair ties are made from soft fabric with a durable elastic band, effectively maintaining the shape of your hair and preventing hair from falling over your face during any activity, retaining its elasticity and usability for a long time and because it is seamless, it will never break.

Suitable size: The normal diameter of COZEASY hair ties is approximately 2.5 inches / 6 cm, while the maximum diameter is approx. 9 inches / 23 cm With such good elasticity, the hair ties fit most types of hair, especially for thick/curly hair. It can fix your hair so well for a long time without loosening or falling out.

Versatile Occasions: It is an essential piece for your daily hair accessory; vibrant colors, suitable for most formal or casual occasions such as office, laboratory, school, parties, sports activities, etc. You can design a variety of carrying methods yourself. In addition, the hair bands are well packaged in a customized bag, it is a good choice to send them as a gift.
CUSTOMER SERVICE We stand behind the quality of our products and ensure a pleasant shopping experience for our customers. One-year warranty and 24-hour response customer service are promised.
